extracted_relationship.entity_from: string (The entity acting or supplying. Usually [__NE_FROM__])
extracted_relationship.entity_to: string (The entity receiving or being acted upon. Usually [__NE_TO__])
extracted_relationship.relation_type: string (MUST be one of: 'Reject', 'B supplies A', 'A supplies B', 'Partnership', or 'Ownership')
extracted_relationship.reasoning: string (A strict one-sentence explanation of why this relation_id was chosen based on the text)
